feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CDS view for generated table of Pricing Condition
entry.content:
Hi,

We created new condition type and this generated new table A900. We want to use it in our customization but we cannot find it's corresponding CDS view. Is there a released API as well on this? Thank you

 

Best Regards,

Emman

entry.title: Fiori Application in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!!

Can i create a Fiori Application in SAP Public Cloud without using BTP (Business Application Studio)?

Thanks in Advance

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Select Quantity only in CASES from SOURCEBIN while creating WAREHOUSE TASK
entry.content:
Team,

 

We have a requirement in S4 HANA cloud where System should restrict the user to Pick partial quantity. Picking should always be done for the complete Case Quantity as per conversion rate maintained in the material master.

System should skip the BIN/Batch wherein Stock is less than the Case Quantity.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility EWM - Warehouse Order Processing EWM - Delivery Processing

entry.title: Customization of Sales Order screen based on material type in cloud (SAP ABAP).
entry.content:
Hii Community,

How do I customize the sales order screen based on the material type given . I have created some custom fields out of which some are related to type "A" and some are related to type "B". I need to make sales order screen such that Custom Fields related to Type "A" should appear when a particular Material Type is selected and similarly for Type "B" . 

Thanks

Shraddha yak

entry.title: Is it possible to restrict which Business Role is assignable to a Business User?
entry.content:
Hello Dear SAP,

 

With the administrator role I can assign business roles to the business users. For all business users to all business roles.

I would like to create a subadmin business role. For example a Purchaser Administrator. The Purchaser administrator can only assign the business roles that are related to purchasing. Is that even possible? How would I handle this?

I decided to restrict a copied version of the administrator role to achiev this. I restricted the businessroles with a assigned bussines group. Therefore in the value help it should only display the purchase business roles(according to the bussines group). But the restriction simply doesnt work! it doesnt has any effect of restriction. This seems like a software bug to me.

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Recommended approach for Fiori Adapt UI in S/4H On-Premise system (Customizing client) with no data
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

For a client's S/4HANA greenfield implementation with Private Cloud (RISE with SAP), there are two clients in the Development system i.e. Customizing client (400) and Test Client (410). The client has decided not to allow any (test) data creation in client 400 but only in test client 410 (this approach seems standard in many projects).

To implement Fiori Adapt-UI enhancements and test Key-User Extensibility, we need those UI screens where we want to implement changes. For example, to change something on a Product (detail) screen, we need to navigate from the Products list in the Manage Product Master Data Fiori app. But without any data, this navigation is not possible.

The question is, what is the best or recommended to work on such Enhancements? Should we allow such Enhancements in the Test client which means also the possibility of creating a Transport Request where such enhancements could be locked for further systems?

Had anyone been in a similar system environment and what kind of approach was used there?

SAP Fiori Launchpad SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition @Jocelyn_Dart @MioYasutake

entry.title: how to check business catalog to be assigned For custom in app application in sap s4hana cloud?
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

We have developed a custom in-app application based on custom CDS views and analytical querying using standard views (I_MfgOrderDocdGoodsMovement and I_FixedAsset). We need to assign it to a particular user. How can we determine the suitable Business Catalog to assign to the custom application for the specific user to access it?

Could you please explain and assist us with our query?

Thanks and Regards, Ruchi Kesharwani

entry.title: Get Delivery Header Text in S4HANA Cloud custom CDS view
entry.content:
Team,

How do i get the Long Text stored within Delivery's Header textid within Custom CDS View?

entry.title: How to Update custom field added via key user extensibility in sap s4 hana public cloud
entry.content:
How can we update the custom field added  using key user extensibility in s4 hana public cloud system. I have added customer GRN number in vf01 screen which i want to update using abap code after billing and accounting document is generated. How can we achieve that. Or is there any another way of doing it.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to update the custom fields added via key user extensibility in mass upload
entry.content:
I have created two custom fields in billing document header level. 1. Customer GRN document no and Customer GRN date.

This data is available with us after the Goods receipt at customer side. 

My question is  can we mass update these fields. if yes then how can we update.

entry.title: Business Role or Business Catalog to Application / Fiori ID Assignment - API
entry.content:
Good day, 

We would like to extract the data from an external source that displays the Business Catalog and the Fiori Applications assigned to the Business Catalogs.

Is there an API endpoint available for this service? If not, is it possible at all the convert this odata service to an API so that we can extract the data from an external source?

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Screen personas S4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Team,

I would like to ask if i want to restrict posting a movement type from an app called 'Warehouse Monitor' based on some specific users.

Is it possible to cater this via Screen persona?

entry.title: SAP SCREEN PERSONAS - SAP EWM WAREHOUSE MONITOR
entry.content: Wanted to disable button within app - Warehouse Monitor based on movement type that too applicable for some users. Is it possible in S/4 HANA Public Cloud?

entry.title: SAP Fiori UI Adaptation: Hide 'Standard' View
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using UI Adaptation to hide certain fields in a standard Fiori app. What we would like to do is hide a few fields in a smart table object. As seen in the screenshot below, we have created a 'Custom' variant for the Roles table by hiding certain fields. But when the app loads with this new UI variant, the user is still able to select the 'Standard' variant for the Roles table and see All the fields, even those that were hidden in the Custom variant. How do we prevent the user from selecting the Standard variant such that only the Custom variant is selectable/displayed?

I'm pretty sure this must be a common requirement - hiding fields in tables/line items?

 

 

 

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Custom field in VG01
entry.content:
Dear support,

I would like to ask to you if it is possibile to implement a custom field in app Create Delivery Group.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Header Pricing Condition Print Option for Purchase Order Form in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

We are trying to print PO Header Conditions in output forms as shown below. Below is the setting available that we did to print it as gross value i.e. Making the Print Type as "A"

We are unable to get it in output form. Once we make it to item level with Print Type as "a" it comes in output. 

Is there any other setting to be done?

Thanks in Advance,

entry.title: Details related to Factory Calendar Endpoint in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Team,

As a newcomer to S4 HANA Public Cloud, I am currently navigating through the platform with the aim of locating the 'Maintain Holiday Calendar' option. Unfortunately, I have been unsuccessful in my attempts to find it. My objective is to access the data from the Holiday Calendar through an API for integration with my BTP CAP Application.

Could anyone guide me on how to achieve this or point me in the direction of relevant documentation or resources?

In API Accesslator HUB, I found this option as CDS Views - Holiday Calendar

 

Regards,

Rahul Jain

entry.title: Data extension Form for Digitally Signed Billing Documents (Portugal)
entry.content:
I need to extend the data source FDP_V3_BD_STANDARD_GLO_PT_SRV in order to add the outbound delivery number.

I have already tried to use the custom fields app, I tried to find this data source in the data source extension tab but I wasn't able to find it. I then tried to create a custom field (then i would apply a custom logic to it) under the Sales: Billing Document (SD_BILLINGDOC) business context but I was not able to find usage for the billing form templates.

Can you please help me find a way to solve this?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: what is the difference between adobe forms on public cloud and sap form services by adobe?
entry.content: SAP BTP, ABAP environment  SAP Forms service by Adobe SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: DEBUG Custom logic S4HANA CLOUD
entry.content: I just wanted to understand in S4HANA Cloud public edition , if I need to debug the logic written inside BADI within CUSTOM LOGIC app. How could I perform ?
